stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
At a mass of 140 tons:

options.a: the buffet free range in a level 30 degree bank turn at FL360 is from approximately M = 0.74 to M = 0.84.
options.b: buffet free flight at 1 g at FL410 is possible.
options.c: at FL410 buffet free flight is possible at M = 0.80 only.
options.d: the buffet free range in 1 g flight at FL400 is from approximately M = 0.76 to M = 0.835.
